chunks.text: Technical Reports - 1971. Matroid with Parity Conditions: A New Class of Combinatorial Optimization Problems (M334) by Eugene L. Lawler. Matroid Intersection Algorithms (M333) by Eugene L. Lawler. A Matroid Generalization of a Theorem of Medelsohn and Dulmage (M328) by Sukhamay Kundu and Eugene L. Lawler. Optimal Sequencing of a Single Machine Subject to Precedence Constraints (M327) by E.L. Lawler. Studies on Graph Theory: 1. Partial Squares of Trees 2. Factorization of Graphs (M326) by Sukhamay Kundu.

Symbolic Analysis of Linear Networks (M322) by Jacob Katzenelson and Shalom Tsur. Nonlinear Monotone Networks (M321) by C.A. Desoer and F.F. Wu. A Matrix Decomposition-Reduction Procedure For the Pole-Zero Calculation of Transfer Functions (M318) by Tatsuo Ohtsuki and Lap-Kit Cheung. Algorithm Verification Applied to the Todd-Coxeter Algorithm (M317) by Carolyn T. Williamson and W.D. Maurer. A Sparse Matrix Method For Analysis of Piecewise-Linear Resistive Networks (M316) by T. Fujisawa, E.S. Kuh and T. Ohtsuki.

Fasbol, A SNOBL4 Compiler (M314) by Paul Joseph Santos Jr. Discrete-Time Convolution Feedback Systems (M313) by F.M. Callier and C.A. Desoer. Convolution Feedback Systems (M312) by C.A. Desoer and F.M. Callier. An Assessment of Energy and Materials Utilization in the USA (M310) by A.B. Makhijani and A.J. Lichtenberg. Design of Linear Multivariable Systems (M309) by Shih-Ho Wang.

The k-Factor Conjecture is True (M308) by Sukhamay Kundu. Nonlinear N-Ports: I--Characterization, Classification, and Representation (M307) by L.O. Chua and Y-F Lam. Theory of Electron Cyclotron Resonance Heating II: Long Time and Stochastic Effects (M306) by M.A. Lieberman and A.J. Lichtenberg. Theory of Electron Cyclotron Resonance Heating I: Short Time and Adiabatic Effects (M305) by F. Jaeger, A.J. Lichtenberg and M.A. Lieberman. Dynamic Programming Conditions for Partially Observable Stochastic Systems (M304) by M.H.A. Davis and P.P. Varaiya.

Synthesis of Nonlinear DC Circuit Models for Three-Terminal Devices (M303) by Leon O. Chua. Fuzzy Languages and Their Relation to Human and Machine Intelligence (M302) by L.A. Zadeh. Rate of Convergence of a Class of Methods of Feasible Directions (M301) by O. Pironneau and E. Polak. Global Inverse Function Theorem (M300) by Felix F. Wu and Charles A. Desoer. A Dual Method for Optimal Control Problems with Initial and Final Boundary Constraints (M299) by O. Pironneau and E. Polak.

Stochastic and Adiabatic Behavior of Particles Accelerated by Periodic Forces (M298) by M.A. Lieberman and A.J. Lichtenberg. An Adaptive Algorithm for Unconstrained Optimization with an Application to Optimal Control (M297) by R. Klessig and E. Polak. On the Rate of Convergence of Certain Methods of Centers (M296) by O. Pironneau and E. Polak. Recent Results Concerning the Input-Output Properties of Linear Time-Invariant Systems (M295) by C.A. Desoer and F.L. Lam.
